title: The Crowded Laboratory
description: You watched experiments unfold across the room — never sure who used which ingredient. Combine the golem's reactions with overheard market results to uncover the truth.

hints.text:
Golem chest reacts to R+L; ears react to B+S.
Slot 4 is non-reactive. Slot 3 reacts to chest only.
Exactly 1 of slots {1,2,6} is an animator.

The 'opposite' sell result for R+ means the true mix was R−.
For a pair from {2,6,7} to produce R−, deduce which pair fits given golem constraints.

Animators are always opposite alchemicals — they mix to Neutral.
Slots 1 and 7 are the animators (alch 6 and 5).
